title: lobelia walkeri
intro: Lobelia walkeri, also known as Indian tobacco, is a plant species belonging to the Lobeliaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lobelia walkeri include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Lobelia walkeri is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and can also be smoked in a similar way to tobacco, although it's essential to use caution and follow proper dosing guidelines.
